# Design System: Ion

---

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

Ion is a social app that feels intimate and calm — not loud. The design evokes a warm celestial atmosphere: parchment-toned backgrounds under a cool blue accent, like moonlight on sand. The grain overlay adds tactile depth without competing with content. Cormorant Garamond was replaced with **Hahmlet** as the heading font to provide Korean language support while maintaining the serif editorial character.

The visual identity balances warm and cool: warm HSL-60° neutral backgrounds (hue ~67 in OKLCH) contrasted against a blue accent (hue ~251 in OKLCH). This creates a distinctive split-temperature palette — warm surfaces, cool interactions. The dark mode inverts lightness while preserving the warm-cool split, creating a deep warm-black background with brighter blue accents.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Background base: `oklch(0.9809 0.0040 107.0)` (light) / `oklch(0.1576 0.0051 48.3)` (dark)
- Primary heading font: Hahmlet (Korean + Latin serif)
- Body font: Pretendard (Korean + Latin sans-serif)
- Brand accent: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2)` — blue, hue 251°
- Border style: `oklch(0.8865 0.0066 67.6)` — warm neutral
- Corner radius tone: **soft** (6px / 12px / 16px / full)

---

### Semantic Tokens

#### Background Surfaces
- **Surface Default**: `oklch(0.9809 0.0040 107.0)` (light) / `oklch(0.1576 0.0051 48.3)` (dark) — Main page background
- **Surface Subtle**: `oklch(0.9713 0.0028 84.6)` (light) / `oklch(0.2040 0.0069 48.3)` (dark) — Card backgrounds
- **Surface Muted**: `oklch(0.9091 0.0042 67.5)` (light) / `oklch(0.3002 0.0084 48.3)` (dark) — Hover states, skeletons
- **Surface Inverse**: `oklch(0.2151 0.0095 48.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.9424 0.0058 84.6)` (dark) — Inverted sections

#### Text & Content
- **Primary Text**: `oklch(0.2151 0.0095 48.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.9424 0.0058 84.6)` (dark)
- **Secondary Text**: `oklch(0.5535 0.0180 48.3)` (light) / `oklch(0.6462 0.0173 67.5)` (dark)
- **Tertiary Text**: `oklch(0.6459 0.0150 67.0)` (light) / `oklch(0.5659 0.0150 67.0)` (dark) — Placeholders
- **Inverse Text**: `oklch(0.9713 0.0028 84.6)` (light) / `oklch(0.1576 0.0051 48.3)` (dark)
- **Brand Text**: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.5439 0.1184 250.9)` (dark)

#### Brand & Interactive
- **Interactive Primary**: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.5439 0.1184 250.9)` (dark)
- **Interactive Primary Hover**: `oklch(0.4966 0.1043 251.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.5766 0.1043 251.2)` (dark)
- **Interactive Primary Active**: `oklch(0.4166 0.1043 251.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.4966 0.1043 251.2)` (dark)
- **Interactive Bg**: `oklch(0.9399 0.0034 67.4)` (light) / `oklch(0.2585 0.0085 48.3)` (dark)
- **Interactive Text**: `oklch(0.3698 0.0209 48.1)` (light) / `oklch(0.8913 0.0111 84.6)` (dark)

#### Status
- **Success**: `oklch(0.6 0.15 150)` / bg: `oklch(0.6 0.15 150 / 0.15)`
- **Warning**: `oklch(0.65 0.18 75)` / bg: `oklch(0.65 0.18 75 / 0.15)`
- **Error**: `oklch(0.5786 0.2137 27.2)` / bg: `oklch(0.5786 0.2137 27.2 / 0.15)`
- **Info**: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2)` / bg: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2 / 0.15)`

#### Borders & Dividers
- **Border Subtle**: `oklch(0.9091 0.0042 67.5)` (light) / `oklch(0.3002 0.0084 48.3)` (dark)
- **Border Default**: `oklch(0.8865 0.0066 67.6)` (light) / `oklch(0.3205 0.0091 48.3)` (dark)
- **Border Strong**: `oklch(0.6459 0.0150 67.0)` (light) / `oklch(0.5659 0.0150 67.0)` (dark)
- **Border Focus**: `oklch(0.4566 0.1043 251.2)` (light) / `oklch(0.5439 0.1184 250.9)` (dark)

### Shadows
- **Shadow SM**: `0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06)` (light) / `0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.20)` (dark)
- **Shadow MD**: `0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08)` (light) / `0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25)` (dark)
- **Shadow LG**: `0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12)` (light) / `0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.30)` (dark)
- **Shadow XL**: `0 16px 40px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.16)` (light) / `0 16px 40px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.35)` (dark)
- **Glow**: `0 0 20px oklch(0.5903 0.1492 252.0 / 0.15), 0 0 40px oklch(0.5903 0.1492 252.0 / 0.08)`

---

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Families
- **Display / Heading**: `Hahmlet`, fallback: `Georgia, serif` — Korean + Latin serif with editorial character
- **Body / UI**: `Pretendard`, fallback: `-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif` — Korean + Latin sans-serif
- **Monospace**: `ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace`

### Hierarchy

| Role | Font | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing |
|------|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| Display | Hahmlet | 48px | 600 | 1.10 | -0.02em |
| Heading 1 | Hahmlet | 36px | 600 | 1.20 | -0.02em |
| Heading 2 | Hahmlet | 28px | 600 | 1.30 | -0.02em |
| Heading 3 | Hahmlet | 22px | 600 | 1.35 | normal |
| Body Large | Pretendard | 18px | 400 | 1.60 | normal |
| Body | Pretendard | 16px | 400 | 1.60 | normal |
| Body Small | Pretendard | 14px | 400 | 1.50 | normal |
| Label | Pretendard | 13px | 500 | 1.40 | normal |
| Caption | Pretendard | 11px | 400 | 1.40 | normal |
| Button | Pretendard | 14px | 500 | 1.00 | normal |

### Typography Principles
Hahmlet provides Korean text with the serif elegance that Cormorant Garamond brought to Latin. The -0.02em tracking on headings tightens the serif for a refined editorial feel. Pretendard's clean geometry ensures body text remains highly readable at small sizes. The weight range is deliberately narrow (400–600 for most roles) to maintain the calm, understated personality.

---

## 4. Component Stylings

### Buttons

**Primary Button** — `variant="primary"`
- Background: `var(--interactive-primary)`
- Text: `var(--surface-default)` (light fg from accent palette)
- Border-radius: `var(--radius-md)` (12px)
- Hover: `var(--interactive-primary-hover)`
- Active: `var(--interactive-primary-active)`
- Disabled: `opacity: 40%`

**Secondary Button** — `variant="secondary"`
- Background: `var(--interactive-bg)`
- Text: `var(--interactive-text)`
- Hover: `var(--surface-muted)`

**Ghost Button** — `variant="ghost"`
- Background: transparent
- Text: `var(--text-primary)`
- Hover background: `var(--surface-muted)`

**Outline Button** — `variant="outline"`
- Background: transparent
- Border: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-default)`
- Text: `var(--text-primary)`

**Destructive Button** — `variant="error"`
- Background: `var(--state-error)`
- Text: `oklch(0.98 0 0)`
- Hover: darker red step

**Size Scale:**
| Size | Height | Padding X | Font Size |
|------|--------|-----------|-----------|
| x-small | 28px | 10px | 12px |
| small | 32px | 12px | 13px |
| medium | 36px | 14px | 14px |
| large | 40px | 16px | 15px |

### Inputs & Forms

**Text Input** (normal state)
- Background: `var(--surface-default)`
- Border: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-default), var(--shadow-sm)`
- Focus: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-focus), var(--shadow-sm)`
- Error: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--state-error), var(--shadow-sm)`
- Disabled: `opacity: 40%, cursor: not-allowed`
- Placeholder: `var(--text-tertiary)`
- Border-radius: `var(--radius-md)` (12px)

**CSS tokens:**
```css
--input-shadow:       0 0 0 1px var(--border-default), var(--shadow-sm);
--input-shadow-focus: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-focus), var(--shadow-sm);
--input-shadow-error: 0 0 0 1px var(--state-error), var(--shadow-sm);
```

### Radius-Tier Mapping

| Component | Radius token | Value |
|-----------|--------------|-------|
| Button | `--radius-md` | 12px |
| Input | `--radius-md` | 12px |
| Card | `--radius-lg` | 16px |
| Dialog/Modal | `--radius-lg` | 16px |
| Popover/Dropdown | `--radius-lg` | 16px |
| Badge/Pill | `--radius-full` | 9999px |
| Tooltip | `--radius-sm` | 6px |

### Cards & Containers

**Elevated Card**
- Background: `var(--surface-default)`
- Shadow: `var(--shadow-sm)`
- Border-radius: `var(--radius-lg)` (16px)

**Outlined Card**
- Background: `var(--surface-default)`
- Border: `1px solid var(--border-default)`
- Border-radius: `var(--radius-lg)` (16px)

**Filled Card**
- Background: `var(--surface-subtle)`
- Border-radius: `var(--radius-lg)` (16px)

### Badges

| Variant | Background | Text |
|---------|-----------|------|
| default | `var(--surface-muted)` | `var(--text-secondary)` |
| success | success-bg | success color |
| warning | warning-bg | warning color |
| error | error-bg | error color |
| info | info-bg | info color |

Shape: `border-radius: var(--radius-full)` (pill)

### Dialog / Modal

- Backdrop: `oklch(0 0 0 / 0.4)`
- Popup: `var(--surface-default)`, `var(--shadow-xl)`, `border-radius: var(--radius-lg)`
- Max widths: small 380px, medium 520px, large 680px
- Width: `w-full max-w-[Xpx]` (responsive)

### Toast / Notification

- Use Sonner library (`sonner` package)
- Mount at app root: `<Toaster position="bottom-right" richColors closeButton />`
- Style via CSS tokens

### Tabs

- Tab list: horizontal scrollable, `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle)`
- Active tab: `var(--text-primary)`, bottom border indicator `var(--interactive-primary)`
- Inactive: `var(--text-tertiary)`, hover `var(--text-secondary)`

---

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing System
- Base unit: `4px`
- Scale: `2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 64, 80, 96` px

### Container & Grid
- Max content width: responsive (card-based layout, no fixed max)
- Card gap: 16px
- Section vertical padding: 24–48px

### Whitespace Philosophy
Ion uses generous whitespace to create a calm reading experience. The warm-tinted backgrounds make negative space feel intentional rather than empty. Cards float with subtle shadow depth. Mobile-first spacing ensures touch targets meet 44px minimum.

---

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Treatment | Use Case |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| Flat | No shadow | Page background, table rows |
| SM | `0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06)` | Cards, inputs |
| MD | `0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08)` | Dropdowns, popovers |
| LG | `0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12)` | Modals, drawers |
| XL | `0 16px 40px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.16)` | Spotlight dialogs |
| Glow | `0 0 20px accent / 0.15, 0 0 40px accent / 0.08` | Signature hover effect |
| Focus | `0 0 0 3px var(--border-focus) / 30%` | Keyboard focus ring |

---

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- Use `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px` for interactive element borders (no layout shift on state change)
- Use semantic tokens (`--text-primary`, not `--color-neutral-900`) in components
- Use CSS `:hover` and `:active` for interactive states — not JS event handlers
- Use named React imports: `import { forwardRef, useId } from "react"`
- Use `ComponentProps<typeof X>` for extending component props
- Use `oklch()` for all color values — never hex or hsl in token definitions
- Verify WCAG 2.2 AA contrast (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large text) for all text/surface pairs

### Don't
- Don't use `React.FC`, `React.ReactNode`, `React.ElementRef` (use imported types)
- Don't use `import * as React from "react"` (use named imports)
- Don't hardcode color values in components (always use semantic tokens)
- Don't use CSS `border` on inputs/selects (use box-shadow to avoid layout shift)
- Don't use inline `style={{}}` for component styling (use Tailwind classes)
- Don't use JS state (onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave) for hover/active — use CSS :hover/:active
- Don't use primitive tokens in components (`--color-blue-500`, only `--interactive-primary`)

---

## 8. Responsive Behavior

### Breakpoints
| Name | Width | Key Changes |
|------|-------|-------------|
| Mobile | < 640px | Single column, stacked layouts |
| Tablet | 640–768px | Two-column, condensed nav |
| Laptop | 768–1024px | Expanded layout |
| Desktop | > 1024px | Full layout, wide cards |

### Touch Targets
- Minimum tap target: `44×44px`
- Buttons scale to minimum height at all sizes

### Collapsing Strategy
- Navigation: horizontal tab bar
- Card grids: responsive width with `max-w-[400px]`
- Dialog: `w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] max-w-[Xpx]` on mobile

### Z-Index Scale
| Level | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| Base | 0 | Content |
| Dropdown | 100 | Toasts, dropdowns |
| Overlay | 400 | Full-page overlays |
| Sticky | 450 | FAB, controls |
| Modal | 500 | Header, dialogs |
| Notification | 999 | Toast notifications |

---

## 9. Decisions Log

- `2026-06-13` — Initial DESIGN.md generation from Phases 1–4b outputs
- `2026-06-13` — Greenfield strategy: building new `src/design-system/` alongside existing components
- `2026-06-13` — Extracted existing HSL palette, converted to OKLCH with 11-step scales for accent (blue), warm neutral, and destructive (red)
- `2026-06-13` — Changed heading font from Cormorant Garamond → Hahmlet for Korean language support
- `2026-06-13` — Styling approach: Tailwind CSS v3 with CSS custom properties for tokens
- `2026-06-13` — Theme: `data-theme` attribute switching, custom ThemeProvider (client-only Vite SPA)
- `2026-06-13` — Radius tone: soft (6px / 12px / 16px / full)

---

## 10. Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Token Reference
- Primary action background: `var(--interactive-primary)`
- Page background: `var(--surface-default)`
- Card background: `var(--surface-subtle)`
- Primary text: `var(--text-primary)`
- Secondary text: `var(--text-secondary)`
- Border default: `var(--border-default)`
- Error state: `var(--state-error)`
- Focus ring: `var(--border-focus)`
- Accent glow: signature `box-shadow` with `var(--interactive-primary)` at low opacity

### Example Component Prompts
- "Create a card: `var(--surface-subtle)` bg, `var(--border-default)` outline, `var(--radius-lg)`, CardHeader with `var(--surface-muted)` + border-bottom, CardContent with 20px padding"
- "Create a primary button: `var(--interactive-primary)` bg, `var(--surface-default)` text, hover `var(--interactive-primary-hover)`, active `var(--interactive-primary-active)`"
- "Create an input: box-shadow `var(--input-shadow)`, focus `var(--input-shadow-focus)`, error `var(--input-shadow-error)`, placeholder `var(--text-tertiary)`"

### Iteration Guide
1. Always reference semantic tokens, never raw color values
2. When adding a new component, follow existing size variant naming: `x-small | small | medium | large`
3. Match border approach: box-shadow for interactive outlines, CSS border for structural dividers
4. Test hover/focus/active/disabled states in both light and dark themes
5. Verify WCAG 2.2 AA contrast (4.5:1) for any new text/background pair
